title: Signal S11 Intermittent Failure — Relay Corrosion
description: Signal S11 at Rivergate began producing intermittent false-clear indications. Initial investigation revealed significant corrosion buildup on the primary relay contacts. The failure caused two delayed departures and one emergency hold. Weather conditions in the preceding 72 hours included 85% humidity.
resolution: Complete relay unit replacement with marine-grade component. Applied anti-corrosion treatment to housing.
lessonsLearned: Humidity above 80% accelerates relay corrosion in exposed signal housings. Corrosion inspections should be scheduled every 6 months in flood-prone zones. Marine-grade relays should be standard for all Rivergate signals.

title: Signal S11 Failure During Heavy Rainfall — Water Ingress
description: Signal S11 went to danger during peak monsoon rainfall at 340mm/day. Water ingress through degraded housing seal caused short circuit in electronics board. Signal remained at danger for 47 minutes affecting 8 train movements. Emergency manual operation was invoked.
resolution: Complete seal replacement on signal housing. Installed drainage channel around base. Applied weatherproof coating to electronics compartment.
lessonsLearned: Weather-resistant housing seals must be replaced every 18 months. Drainage channels are mandatory for all signals in flood-prone zones. Backup manual operation protocols should be reviewed annually.

title: Signal S11 Communication Loss — Connector Degradation
description: Signal S11 lost communication with control center during routine operations. Investigation found oxidized connector pins at the termination block, causing intermittent data loss to the SCADA system. The connector showed signs of galvanic corrosion consistent with exposure to saline moisture.
resolution: Replaced communication connector with gold-plated marine connector. Applied dielectric grease. Upgraded cable routing to prevent moisture pooling.
lessonsLearned: Signal communication connectors in humid environments should be upgraded to gold-plated marine grade. Replacement interval: 18 months. Dielectric grease application is mandatory at installation.

title: Signal S12 False Proceed Indication
description: Signal S12 at Rivergate South showing intermittent false-proceed indication. Suspected relay issue similar to S11 failure in 2024.
resolution: Relay unit replaced. Corrosion treatment applied.
lessonsLearned: Adjacent signals in same zone share environmental risks. When S11 type failure occurs, all adjacent signals should be inspected.

title: Switch SW-002 Stuck in Normal Position
description: Rivergate crossover switch failed to move to reverse position during planned train movement. Point motor overheated. Caused 35-minute delay.
resolution: Replaced point motor. Added thermal protection circuit.
lessonsLearned: Switch motors in high-use areas require thermal monitoring. Consider auto-rest cooling cycles.

title: Track TRK-003 Joint Crack Detected
description: Routine ultrasonic inspection detected hairline crack at track joint 3.4km mark. Precautionary speed restriction imposed.
resolution: Joint replaced with thermite weld. Speed restriction lifted after inspection.
lessonsLearned: High-utilization tracks require ultrasonic inspection every 6 months rather than annual.

title: Signal S15 Calibration Drift on Mountain Grade
description: Signal S15 at Hillview grade showing calibration drift. Temperature differential between day and night causing relay bimetal strip expansion.
resolution: Recalibrated relay. Installed temperature-compensated relay housing.
lessonsLearned: Mountain route signals require quarterly calibration checks due to temperature variation. Temperature-compensated housings should be standard.

title: Signal S18 Metro Central Overload
description: Signal S18 experienced processing overload during peak hour operation with simultaneous 14 train movements. System response time exceeded safety threshold.
resolution: Upgraded signal processor firmware. Implemented load-shedding protocol.
lessonsLearned: High traffic signals require load testing at 150% nominal capacity annually.

title: Signal S20 Port Link Communication Failure
description: Signal S20 communication link to control center severed. Salt-air corrosion identified on external cable connectors. Similar to S11 connector pattern but with marine exposure.
resolution: All external connectors replaced with marine-grade sealed connectors. Cable tray replaced with corrosion-resistant material.
lessonsLearned: Port proximity requires marine-grade specifications for all external connections. Annual salt spray inspection mandatory.

title: Signal S11 Pre-Failure Warning — Relay Resistance Drift
description: Predictive monitoring detected relay resistance drifting above threshold on S11. Preventive maintenance initiated before failure occurred.
resolution: Preventive relay replacement. Third occurrence for this asset — marine relay spec applied.
lessonsLearned: Predictive monitoring proved effective. Resistance threshold monitoring should be deployed on all Rivergate signals.

title: Signal S12 Seal Failure Post-Monsoon
description: Post-monsoon inspection found seal failure on S12 identical to INC-057 pattern on S11.
resolution: Housing seal replaced. Drainage channel installed.
lessonsLearned: Post-monsoon inspection of all Rivergate signals is now mandatory. Seal replacement interval reduced to 12 months.

title: Switch SW-001 Lubrication Failure
description: Lubrication dried out on SW-001 during winter. Increased motor current detected.
resolution: Lubrication renewed. Inspection interval changed from 6 to 3 months.

title: Signal S19 Industrial Hub Surge Damage
description: Power surge from adjacent industrial operations damaged signal S19 power supply unit.
resolution: PSU replaced. Surge protection devices installed on all Industrial Hub signals.
lessonsLearned: Industrial zone signals require surge protection as standard.

title: Signal S11 Current Anomaly Detected
description: Current monitoring shows irregular draw pattern on Signal S11. Pattern consistent with pre-failure relay resistance drift observed in INC-061. Asset currently under investigation.

title: Signal S12 Maintenance Overdue Alert
description: Signal S12 maintenance is 240 days overdue. Risk of failure elevated given adjacent S11 condition.

title: Switch SW-002 Slow Operation Warning
description: Switch SW-002 at Rivergate showing slow operation time above threshold. Could indicate mechanical wear or lubrication issue.

title: Signal S13 Power Supply Failure
description: Backup power supply failed during scheduled maintenance window.
resolution: Backup PSU replaced. Primary PSU load-tested.

title: Track TRK-001 Ballast Settlement
description: Ballast settlement detected on main line following heavy rainfall.

title: Signal S15 Night Temperature Drift
description: S15 relay showing drift during night temperature drops below 5°C.

title: Signal S16 Firmware Update Failure
description: Automated firmware update caused signal to lock in restrictive mode.
resolution: Firmware rollback applied. Update procedure revised.

title: Signal Relay Resistance Drift
description: Signal Relay Resistance Drift. Reported by operations control.
rootCause: Thermal cycling over 12 years causing drift
lessonsLearned: Monitor relay resistance quarterly. Replace when >120% of nominal.

title: Signal Timing Anomaly — Aspect Hold Time
description: Signal Timing Anomaly — Aspect Hold Time. Reported by operations control.
rootCause: Software timer drift in relay logic controller
lessonsLearned: Firmware audit required for controllers older than v2.3.

title: Signal Timing Anomaly — Aspect Hold Time
description: Signal Timing Anomaly — Aspect Hold Time. Reported by operations control.
rootCause: Software timer drift in relay logic controller

description: Signal Aspect Failure — Wrong Aspect Displayed. Reported by operations control.
resolution: Relay contact replaced and tested under load
lessonsLearned: Relay failure causes incorrect aspect display. Verify relay resistance during inspection.

title: Signal Aspect Failure — Wrong Aspect Displayed
description: Signal Aspect Failure — Wrong Aspect Displayed. Reported by operations control.

lessonsLearned: Relay failure causes incorrect aspect display. Verify relay resistance during inspection.

title: Signal Power Failure — Fuse Blown
description: Signal Power Failure — Fuse Blown. Reported by operations control.
resolution: Surge protection upgraded and fuse replaced
lessonsLearned: Install surge protection on all signal feeds in lightning-prone zones.

title: Signal Aspect Failure — Wrong Aspect Displayed
